metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins for DevOps, monitoring, and research workflows

plugins.name: prometheus-skill
plugins.description: Query and interact with Prometheus HTTP API for monitoring data. Supports instant queries, range queries, metadata endpoints, admin APIs, and alerting information.

plugins.name: grafana-skill
plugins.description: Interact with Grafana API for dashboards, datasources, alerting, annotations, users, and teams management.

plugins.name: loki-skill
plugins.description: Query Loki log aggregation system via LogQL for log exploration, analysis, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: researching-web-skill
plugins.description: Experimental web research agent using open-webSearch (free, no API key). Activate via @web-researcher agent.

plugins.name: deepwiki
plugins.description: AI-powered documentation for GitHub repositories via DeepWiki MCP. Browse wiki structure, read docs, and ask questions about any public repository.

plugins.name: nomad-stack
plugins.description: Manage HashiCorp Nomad workload scheduling and Consul service networking. Supports job specifications, cluster operations, service discovery, service mesh, and Nomad-Consul integration.
